problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Atomic. Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
